title: Use of the SHAKE One-Way Hash Functions in the Cryptographic Message Syntax (CMS)
source: Limited Additional Mechanisms for PKIX and SMIME
abstract: This document updates the "Cryptographic Message Syntax (CMS) Algorithms" (RFC 3370) and describes the conventions for using the SHAKE family of hash functions in the Cryptographic Message Syntax as one-way hash functions with the RSA Probabilistic Signature Scheme (RSASSA-PSS) and Elliptic Curve Digital Signature Algorithm (ECDSA).  The conventions for the associated signer public keys in CMS are also described.
